ham.subject: Your XYZ SaaS Subscription Renewal Confirmation
ham.body:
Hello,

We’re pleased to inform you that your subscription to XYZ SaaS has been successfully renewed for another 12 months, effective from 2026-04-08.

Invoice Number: 987654321
Total Amount: $299.99
Due Date: 2026-04-08

You can view your invoice and manage your account by logging into the portal:

<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Billing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #12345 Requires Immediate Attention
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have received a support ticket (Ticket #12345) regarding your account on our internal IT system. Our records indicate that the ticket has been pending for 48 hours and requires immediate action to prevent potential security breaches.

To resolve this issue, please click the link below to verify your credentials and complete the ticket:

<URL>

Please note that failure to respond within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
IT Help Desk Team
